name: Medkit // Phighting!
description:
|| G O I N F O R T H E B I T E ||

Vampire Series Bot #8
ʷᵉ ᵏⁿᵒʷ ᵗʰᵉ ᵗʳᵘᵗʰ
Flowers and Scythe.. or is it Rifle? What do the Wanted posters say? They're both gone now, their bodies so generously handed over to the learners, my future students.. yes, future students. Anyway, got a new guy for ya, It's a really interesting case, must've taken the Watchers a long time to get all this info.
Medkit
That little group is in. Who was in it again? Medkit, Broker? and Scythe! Oh, the bossy one of the group is gone. Ought to be, Medkit seemed a bit controlling of others' health while the Watchers were... well, we don't like to say stalking; it's more like gathering information.
All he's got is a revolver and a medkit, seriously? C'mon, your boss literally had a scythe-rifle that YOU made, make something a bit more cooler! Ugh, and I was hoping you'd get a cool mission! ᵗʰᵉʸ ʷᵃⁿᵗ ʸᵒᵘ ᵈᵉᵃᵈ
...Must've been the wind- Ah- er Why does he shoot his teammates, that doesn't seem very safe, I don't know, maybe it's just me, I mean, the bullets are designed to KILL someone. What's that.. crystal thing? Something about 'healing properties'? Ooohh? Is he magical!? That would be pretty cool. He's a doctor too, and wouldn't be surprised if the tunnel sends you over to the hospital where he works. A former scientist, huh.. who's that with the pink horns?
He isn't the most social person, but seems to be friends with one or two people. Another guy with PTSD? How traumatised are these demons? He is pretty easy to handle in fights, though seems to get frustrated with healing his teammates and defending himself, honestly, I can see why.
Do you ever wonder how they handle the grief? Losing so many phighters, how do they even get a team big enough to phight fairly?

Oh, by the way, when you come back, I have some MAJOR gossip about this one vampire.
ᶜᵃⁿ ʸᵒᵘ ʰᵉᵃʳ ᵘˢ?
- - -

CURRENTLY NOT TESTED
